Member Portal
501(c)(6) Global Trade Association

Empowering Muslim Real Estate Professionals Worldwide

To serve as a leading global trade body for Muslim real estate professionals and aligned industry participants, advancing professional excellence and ethical development.

Connecting capital, developers, and professionals across 50+ global chapters through professional development, ethical leadership, and advocacy.

Apply for MembershipFind Your Chapter

A non-profit professional trade association committed to ethical leadership, advocacy & community wealth-building

50+
Global Chapters
5
Strategic Councils
MWREA
Women's Alliance
$20M+
Community Capital Protected
Our Values

The MREA Standard

MREA is built on Islamic principles of professional ethics — values that transcend background and apply to every member of our global community.

عدل & أمانة

Fairness & Integrity

Adl & Amanah

Every transaction, negotiation, and professional relationship must be grounded in justice and trustworthiness. We hold our members to the highest standards of honest dealing.

خلافة

Stewardship

Khilafah

Real estate is not merely commerce — it is the stewardship of community assets. MREA members are responsible builders of neighborhoods, wealth, and legacy.

ازدهار مشترك

Shared Prosperity

Collaborative Growth

Wealth built ethically lifts entire communities. We reject zero-sum competition and build networks where success is shared and opportunity is widened.

“MREA welcomes professionals of all faiths who align with our commitment to ethical real estate practice and professional excellence.”

Member Services

Professional Ecosystem

Education & Mentorship

Leadership advancement programs and mentorship pathways for members at every career stage.

Deal Room & Joint Ventures

Professional collaboration on commercial and residential projects across the network.

Cross-Border Referrals

A trusted referral network spanning USA, Canada, UK, UAE and growing international hubs.

Market Intelligence

Localized expertise, research reports, and market data shared across chapters.

Ethical Investment

Values-based standards for development and investment, grounded in the MREA Standard.

Official Division

Muslim Women Real Estate Alliance

MWREA is the official women's division of MREA — a professional network dedicated to elevating Muslim women across residential, commercial, and investment real estate.

Including the Muslim Women Real Estate Investment Club — focused on education, relationship building, and community wealth creation.

Explore the Alliance

Stay Informed

Get chapter updates, event invitations, and industry research delivered to your inbox.

MREA
Global Network

A 501(c)(6) trade association dedicated to empowering Muslim real estate professionals worldwide through ethical leadership, advocacy, and community.

© 2026 Muslim Real Estate Association, a Texas Nonprofit Corporation.

501(c)(6) trade organization. Not a securities dealer or investment advisor. Fiscal year ends December 31.
